summary: Tested 3 new features (Backup export, Next visit recommendation, Prospection zone). All 7 backend pytest cases PASS. Frontend: backup section + download + toast OK; next-visit-admin block OK with '35 jours' text; next-visit-card OK on public space; book-btn prefills date + toast OK; prospection toggle/controls/analyze/results with 3 KPIs and 3 suggestions OK.

ui_bugs.issue: Link has correct href '/rdv/nouveau?client=cli_e998044705' and direct navigation works, but a Playwright click(force=True) then wait resulted in URL /compta. Could not reproduce a real user-facing bug (direct nav confirmed working); may be a click coordinate collision with bottom nav 'Compta' tab in narrow layout. Manual verification recommended.

issues: Map is not centered on Angers by default when opening /carte — a click at map visual center landed on Aulnay-la-Rivière (dept 45) instead of the Angers cluster (47.47,-0.56). Consider setting default map center to the barycenter of geocoded clients so the review-request UX ('un clic au milieu de la carte devrait tomber en France près d'Angers') holds.

action_items: (Low) Verify manually that clicking the 'Planifier' button on /clients/cli_e998044705 navigates to /rdv/nouveau?client=... in real usage (route + href are correct; direct URL nav works).
(Design) Consider auto-centering /carte on the client barycenter instead of a France-wide default, so the Prospection zone lands on the actual client cluster.
critical_code_review_comments: Backup route correctly gated by X-Pin-Token (returns 401 without).
compute_next_visit correctly returns null for clients with <2 done RDVs (verified with cli_98f120d9ce).
Prospection: geo.api.gouv.fr integration cached via communes_cache Mongo collection; response includes exactly 3 suggestions with the required schema.
Public route /api/public/client/{token} exposes next_visit without auth — appropriate for magic-link flow.
seed_data_creation: None (used existing seeds: Sophie cli_e998044705 with 3 done RDVs @ 35d frequency).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend fully green including the earlier 20 pytest cases. New features test file: /app/backend/tests/test_new_features.py. Frontend: all new-feature data-testids present and behaviors correct. Public /c/{token} flow (next-visit-card → book-btn → prefilled Nouveau RDV tab) works end-to-end with 'Coupe Homme' pre-checked and date field non-empty.
